chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5846 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "طُوبَى لِمَنْ طَالَ عُمُرُهُ وَ حَسُنَ عَمَلُهُ فَحَسُنَ مُنْقَلَبُهُ إِذْ رَضِيَ عَنْهُ رَبُّهُ وَ وَيْلٌ لِمَنْ طَالَ عُمُرُهُ وَ سَاءَ عَمَلُهُ فَسَاءَ مُنْقَلَبُهُ إِذْ سَخِطَ عَلَيْهِ رَبُّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5846 - Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"Glad tidings to the one whose life is long and whose deeds are good, for his outcome will be good as his Lord (azj) is pleased with him. And woe to the one whose life is long and whose deeds are evil, for his outcome will be bad as his Lord (azj), the Mighty and Majestic, is displeased with him."
